finding: node atm.mjs atomize register-receipt routed through the frozen onefile cache and failed because scripts/src/atomization-register-receipt.js was not present in the cache.
expectedBehavior: The frozen atomize wrapper should either bundle the required helper script or resolve it from the framework repo root so register-receipt works in normal frozen-runner mode.
evidenceOrRepro: ATM-GOV-0169 attempted `node atm.mjs atomize register-receipt ...` and received ATM_ATOMIZE_REGISTRATION_TOOL_FAILED with MODULE_NOT_FOUND for AppData/Local/Temp/atm-onefile-cache/.../scripts/src/atomization-register-receipt.js. Direct `node scripts/src/atomization-register-receipt.js register-path ...` succeeded.
followUp: Add a task for frozen atomize helper packaging/resolution coverage, including a regression that register-receipt works from node atm.mjs without relying on source-tree-only paths.
